reviews.review_title: One of the best games I’ve played.
reviews.review_description: Crazy gibbons is a bit like gorilla tag but it has a unique feature none of the knock offs have. It has 3rd person! I’ve just spent 1 hour of my life playing this game and I am already addicted! It has good moderation and a good player base. There are a few bugs but you can’t do them on accident! 10/10 definitely recommend! 😁😁
The game is so original and fun you should play it 100%

I’ve been playing for a long time and I Would like to have the kick hammer because there’s so many toxic players and there’s tons of players getting off the map so if I have the kick hammer, then I’ll be able to kick people that are not following the rules and I’ve been playing for a very long time so owner of the game, could you please let me have the kick
hammer please￼

developer_response.body: thanks for the review! sadly we aren't taking any more mods.
